hello-truenas.app_readme:
Hello TrueNAS

This is a tiny starter application for custom TrueNAS SCALE catalogs.

It deploys traefik/whoami, which returns request info and is useful for connectivity and ingress testing.

Use this chart as a template for your own apps.
hello-truenas.description: Minimal starter app for validating a custom TrueNAS catalog
hello-truenas.name: hello-truenas
hello-truenas.title: Hello TrueNAS
